figures.caption: Table 1 | Benchmark for few-shot results on Tahoe-100M, PBMC and Replogle datasets under the Cell Eval metric protocol. Rows marked by † denote results reproduced in our implementation; all unmarked results are taken from PerturbDiff. Specifically, SCALE results on Tahoe-100M, PBMC and Replogle, together with STATE results on Tahoe-100M and Replogle, are reproduced in our implementation. The best result in each metric within each dataset is highlighted in bold, and the second-best result is underlined.
